name: Mycosis
short_description: Welcome to Mycosis - an action-platformer where you are a scientist facing a fungal outbreak among your colleagues. Break into locked labs, explore hidden tunnels, scavenge gear, and piece together a mysterious story to stop the infection!
detailed_description:
Mycosis is a mix of action and puzzle platformer in the style of classic games. It’s been set in dusty corridors of a mysterious research facility that comes alive and kicking, and it’s up to you whether you blast your way through with a flamethrower or find a way to overcome the traps and puzzles using found objects and environmental features.

You know how it is when you come to work in the morning and a strange infection spreads through the ventilation, turning your colleagues into fungal zombies... Classic. The story of the game is inspired by my vocation as a microbiologist (no, The Last of Us wasn’t the inspiration) and contains many references to both current and past aspects of the Institute of Microbiology (MikroBiologický Ústav in Czech) — hence the subtitle Heroes of MBÚ.

Since childhood, I wanted to create my own game. This debut is my humble tribute to the legendary games like Abuse, Half-Life and the original Fallout. I built the game on my own engine, in Java, as an amateur enthusiast which took me over eight years. It was a long - but amazing - journey. It allowed me to dive in and take pleasure in full creative freedom.

Now! I hope you’ll enjoy as much as I enjoyed creating it!

GENERAL CHARACTERISTICS OF THE GAME IN POINTS:

  • Unique Weapons, Gadgets and Items

  • Puzzles Utilizing Environmental Features

  • Tense Atmosphere

  • Original Game Engine

  • Inspired By Classic Games: Abuse, Half-life

  • Created By Real Scientist :D

  • About 7 Hours Of Gameplay

  • LAN Multiplayer (still a work in progress)

Music by Fertilizer. Learn more about Fertilizer's work at bandzone[dot]cz/fertilizer.


Infection spreads smoothly on Steam Deck too! 🧫🕹️
